must_have_breakdown.skill: 8+ years of experience in Car Rental / Fleet Management / Mobility industry
must_have_breakdown.evidence: Candidate has 10+ years across fleet/transport but primarily in EV buses, ambulance fuel ops, and FMCG distribution — not car rental or corporate cab/passenger vehicle mobility.

must_have_breakdown.skill: Strong experience in Operations Management + Sales / Business Development
must_have_breakdown.evidence: Operations management is well-evidenced across multiple roles, but zero sales or business development activity is mentioned anywhere in the resume.

must_have_breakdown.skill: Proven track record in P&L ownership and profitability management
Experience handling corporate clients / B2B accounts
Strong leadership and team management experience
must_have_breakdown.evidence: Candidate mentions driver supervision and coordination with field teams but no explicit team size managed or formal leadership title held.

must_have_breakdown.skill: Good commercial acumen and negotiation skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced target-driven environment
must_have_breakdown.evidence: Emergency ambulance fuel operations and real-time EV bus scheduling demonstrate high-pressure execution capability, but commercial targets are absent.

reasoning: Reject — wrong role level and wrong functional profile for this Profit Centre Head position. This candidate is a solid ground-level fleet operations executor, not a P&L-owning branch leader with sales accountability. The role demands someone who can own branch revenue, manage B2B corporate accounts, drive business development, and lead a commercial team — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. The candidate's strongest differentiator is managing 51 electric buses and 1000+ ambulance vehicles operationally, which is genuine depth but entirely on the execution side. Critically, the recruiter explicitly noted 'passenger management, not goods or Rapido/Uber' — while the candidate does handle passenger mobility (buses, ambulance), there is no car rental or corporate cab fleet experience, no P&L exposure, and no sales dimension whatsoever. With a must-have coverage ratio of 0.29 and zero commercial or leadership evidence at branch-head level, this candidate would need to be fast-tracked two levels beyond their current operating level. Pass unless the talent pool is critically thin.
strengths: EV FLEET OPERATIONS DEPTH: Currently managing 51 electric buses across 76 live schedules at GreenCell Mobility — rare, hands-on EV mobility experience that is genuinely current and market-relevant.

LARGE-SCALE FLEET COMPLIANCE: Managed fuel operations and statutory compliance for 1000+ emergency vehicles at GVK EMRI, demonstrating ability to handle high-volume, high-stakes fleet environments under pressure.

GROUND EXECUTION UNDER PRESSURE: Proven real-time decision-making in breakdown handling, towing approvals, and emergency response — strong operational instincts that would support any ops-heavy branch role.
gaps: ZERO P&L OR COMMERCIAL OWNERSHIP: This is a profit centre head role requiring full branch P&L accountability, B2B sales, and revenue targets. The candidate has never owned a budget, managed a P&L, or handled any sales/business development function — this is a fundamental disqualifier, not a gap that can be bridged with coaching.

NO CAR RENTAL / CORPORATE CAB FLEET BACKGROUND: The recruiter specifically wants passenger fleet management from car rental or similar — this candidate's experience is in inter-city electric buses, ambulance fleets, and FMCG distribution, which does not translate to the corporate cab/car rental client management this role requires.

scoring_factors.reason: No notice period specified in resume; currently employed but no penalty applied without explicit JD notice period limit.
Candidate is based in Hyderabad, matching the JD's in-office Hyderabad requirement.
Candidate has 10+ years total experience, well above half of the 4-year relevant experience threshold.
JD specifies 'Any' gender preference — no penalty applied.
No college preference or exclusion specified in JD — no adjustment applied.

availability_reason: Candidate is currently employed at GreenCell Mobility (Apr 2025 - Present) with no notice period stated on the resume.
alternative_role_fit: Fleet Operations Manager / Senior Fleet Executive
rare_assets: Live EV bus fleet operations experience managing 51 buses across 76 schedules — rare in the Indian mobility market.
Emergency services fleet fuel management at scale (1000+ ambulance vehicles) — niche cross-sector operational credibility.
self_reported_unverified: Claim of 10+ years of experience is stated in summary but the detailed timeline only accounts for roles from 2021 onwards with a vague 'Earlier Experience 2013-2021' block — the depth and relevance of those 8 years cannot be assessed.
Acting as 'operational bridge between control room, depots, and field teams' implies coordination leadership but no team size or reporting structure is confirmed.
interview_flags: Probe the 2013-2021 'Earlier Experience' block — what specific roles, companies, and responsibilities are behind this vague summary, and does any involve corporate cab or car rental passenger fleet?
Ask directly: have you ever owned a P&L, managed a revenue budget, or been accountable for branch-level profitability?
Probe any B2B sales or account management experience — has the candidate ever been responsible for client acquisition, retention, or upselling?
Clarify the team size directly managed at each role — driver supervision is mentioned but no headcount is given for any position.
Ask why the candidate left Bisleri International after only 7 months (Jun 2024 - Jan 2025) — short tenure warrants explanation.
